objective: Reach 100% public New API route compatibility while keeping Elygate PostgreSQL-native and Redis-free until every tracked capability meets production-ready gates.
productionDefinition: Implemented in the Elygate stack without replacing Bun/Elysia/PostgreSQL.
Every public New API route surface remains client-compatible without requiring New API runtime internals.
No default Redis server, Redis client, Redis queue, or Redis cache dependency.
PostgreSQL schema and migration path are explicit when persistence changes.
Automated local tests cover request shape, response shape, error behavior, billing/logging side effects, and rollback where applicable.
Runtime smoke exists for database-backed or async behavior.
User-facing admin or enterprise UI is covered by typecheck and route/UI smoke when the feature has a UI.

Production deployment readiness requires a documented target profile, secrets checklist, migration plan, backup/restore drill, rollback runbook, and reproducible live smoke evidence; actual production promotion still requires explicit authorization.

capabilities.title: Redis-free PostgreSQL platform boundary
newApiReference: New API documents Redis as recommended cache and requires CRYPTO_SECRET for shared Redis.
requiredGates: package manifests scanned for forbidden Redis runtime dependencies
compose files scanned for default Redis services
PostgreSQL-native kernel decision encoded in root check
nextActions: Keep this gate in root check while expanding capabilities.

capabilities.title: OpenAI core, Responses, image, audio, embeddings, rerank
newApiReference: README.zh_CN.md lists OpenAI-compatible, Responses, Image, Audio, Embeddings, Rerank, and Realtime APIs.
requiredGates: golden tests for Responses input extraction and OpenAI-compatible Files/Batches serialization
exact response cache tests for disable, hit, miss, ttl storage, and cleanup behavior
route tests for Responses compact and per-response compact routes
image edits and variations passthrough route tests
dispatcher cache policy tests proving streaming, form-data, images, and Responses bypass exact response cache
streaming response status propagation tests
billing and logs side-effect tests for each protocol family
nextActions: Keep protocol route and billing payload tests in the root check path while expanding long-tail provider coverage.

capabilities.title: Files, Batches, Assistants, Threads, Vector Stores, Fine-tuning Jobs
newApiReference: New API exposes file, batch, and enterprise OpenAI-compatible state-machine surfaces.
requiredGates: real PostgreSQL smoke for file bytea write/read/delete
direct batch executor smoke with JSONL input and terminal result files
pg-boss queue dispatch tests with claimed validating batches
state-machine tests for assistants, threads, runs, vector stores, and fine-tuning jobs
idempotent migration and rollback notes
nextActions: Keep temporary PostgreSQL route-level smoke and migration rollback notes current as state-machine routes expand.

capabilities.title: Realtime API and WebRTC bridge
newApiReference: New API lists OpenAI Realtime API support.
requiredGates: WebSocket proxy smoke
WebRTC bridge documented as explicit non-goal for the current pinned route-parity target
billing and audit evidence for realtime sessions
nextActions: Keep the realtime WebSocket proxy smoke and billing/audit helper tests in the protocol suite.

capabilities.title: Provider breadth and async media/task providers
newApiReference: New API includes Midjourney-Proxy, Suno, Dify, custom upstream, Claude, Gemini, and Rerank references.
requiredGates: provider route contract tests for each enabled provider
async task state stored in PostgreSQL or pg-boss
retry, callback, cancellation, and polling behavior covered
provider secrets redacted in logs and errors
nextActions: Keep provider adapter tests and task-route DB smoke evidence current whenever enabled async providers change.

capabilities.title: Routing, channel health, models, tags, ratios, and admin operations
newApiReference: New API exposes weighted routing, failure retry, model sync, channel testing, user model limits, and ratio configuration.
requiredGates: local derived cache ttl, max-size eviction, and clear behavior tests
routing selection tests for group filtering, priority, weight, and half-open channel ordering
rate-limit fallback tests for consume, get, reward, block, and delete semantics
channel copy and upstream model sync tests
key strategy and key exhaustion tests
status-code mapping and auto-ban tests
retry group selection tests
admin resource exposure typecheck and UI smoke
nextActions: Keep admin operation route tests, admin typecheck, and enterprise runtime browser smoke in the root check evidence.

capabilities.title: Identity, OAuth/OIDC, captcha, email, passkey, and two-factor controls
newApiReference: New API lists Discord, LinuxDO, Telegram, OIDC, captcha, passkey, and two-factor related controllers.
requiredGates: mocked OAuth/OIDC callback tests
captcha provider verification tests without real secrets
two-factor backup-code and authenticator enrollment helper tests
email verification and password reset TTL tests
passkey and two-factor challenge lifecycle tests
session revocation and cookie security checks
nextActions: Keep the loopback OIDC provider callback-domain proof and auth compatibility tests in the compat suite.

capabilities.title: Quota, subscriptions, recharge, redemption, and payment webhooks
newApiReference: New API includes internal recharge, quota allocation, Stripe, EPay, Creem, Waffo, subscription, and redemption controllers.
requiredGates: webhook signature tests for each enabled provider
idempotent payment completion tests
provider webhook parser tests for Creem and Waffo
New API subscription plan mapping tests
quota and subscription transition tests
refund, cancellation, and failure-state policy
compliance decision for public recharge surfaces
nextActions: Keep webhook signature fixtures, idempotency tests, and disabled-by-default public recharge policy in the compat suite.

capabilities.title: Observability, deployment, backup, and production evidence
newApiReference: New API includes audit, billing, performance, system info, uptime, and backup-style operational controllers.
requiredGates: backup status and restore drill documented
log retention and redaction tests
deployment target profile, secrets checklist, migration plan, rollback, backup/restore drill, and reproducible smoke evidence
SLO or minimum health checks for gateway, database, pg-boss, and admin UI
nextActions: Require explicit deployment authorization before running production promotion or live production smoke.

capabilities.title: Panel and enterprise UI coverage
newApiReference: New API product maturity includes dashboard, settings, channels, models, logs, billing, and user management UI.
requiredGates: Svelte typecheck
route inventory and protected-route smoke
admin CRUD smoke for core resources
enterprise console smoke for tenant-scoped resources
no feature is shown in UI without backend support and permission checks
nextActions: Keep seeded admin and enterprise browser smoke coverage in the root check evidence.
